faq.heading: Got Questions?
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our loan products and process

faqs.question: How long does the approval process take?
faqs.answer: Our approval process typically takes 5-15 minutes. Most applicants receive a decision instantly.

faqs.question: What credit score do I need?
faqs.answer: We work with a wide range of credit profiles. You can get a pre-qualification with no credit check.

faqs.question: Can I pay off my loan early?
faqs.answer: Yes! There are no prepayment penalties. You can pay off your loan at any time without fees.

faqs.question: What's the maximum loan amount?
faqs.answer: Maximum loan amounts vary based on loan type and your qualifications. Personal loans go up to $50,000.
